entries.title: resume v0.2.0: a real benchmark, and a retry that stopped wasting time
entries.summary: Adds a real accuracy and speed benchmark you can run with one command, and makes the slow retry path roughly seven times faster by only redoing the part that actually changed.

entries.title: Launched OneTap Resume as a Claude Code skill — 13× faster, with a live style picker, shipped as v0.1.1
entries.summary: Turned the OneTap Resume pipeline into a self-contained Claude Code skill that runs free on the claude subscription: diagnosed the multi-minute tailoring as wasted thinking tokens and made it ~13× faster, added a streaming UX and an instant style picker, leaned out ~1,580 lines, and shipped v0.1.0 then v0.1.1 with automated releases and an MIT license.
